items.title: B-tree
items.content_html: A self-balancing tree data structure that is used to store data in a sorted and searchable manner.

items.title: DHT
items.content_html: A decentralized data structure that is used to store and retrieve data over a network. The HyperDHT is used to facilitate the discovery of peers and to enable connections between them.
